ocr_findings.description:
Table header cells split across two lines in OCR (e.g., '木の幹
SLCP', '枝
工程', '葉
下位工程') instead of single-cell headers; content and row structure otherwise fully preserved.

reviewer_notes: Page covers SLCP introduction and a three-column process hierarchy table (開発プロセス / 運用プロセス / 保守プロセス). All text and table rows are faithfully reproduced. The only minor issue is multi-line header rendering in the markdown table which does not affect meaning.
